title: PCR Prep with Strip Tubes
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol preps one PCR plate with DNA, water, primer letter, primer number, and Kappa enzyme. New tips are granted for DNA and primers, whereas just one column of tips is used for the Kappa enzyme and water, respectively. The water is added via multi-dispensing. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Columns`: Specify the number of DNA columns for this protocol. * `P20 Multi-Channel Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) to host the P20 multi-channel pipette. ---
steps_raw: This protocol preps one PCR plate with DNA, water, primer letter, primer number, and Kappa enzyme. New tips are granted for DNA and primers, whereas just one column of tips is used for the Kappa enzyme and water, respectively. The water is added via multi-dispensing. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Columns`: Specify the number of DNA columns for this protocol. * `P20 Multi-Channel Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) to host the P20 multi-channel pipette. ---
Add 3ul of Water to each PCR well
Add 10ul of Kapa Enzyme to each PCR well
Add 1ul of Primer Number to each PCR well
Add 1ul of Primer Letter to each PCR well
add 5ul of DNA to each PCR well
